name: Part time job injury in Farmington UT, still get full benefits?

mainEntity.name: Part time job injury in Farmington UT, still get full benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, on your average wages—no reduction.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, based on average wages including part-time status.** Utah calculates on actual earnings.[1] Key factors: Prove hours/rate. Covers medical fully. No reduced benefits for part-time. Report same way.
